items.title: Piper Sandler Turns Less Bearish on Workday (WDAY) Following Workday Rising
items.description: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) is one of the Must-Watch AI Stocks on Wall Street. On September 17, Piper Sandler upgraded the stock to “Neutral” from Underweight and raised its price target to $235.00 from $220.00. The rating upgrade follows key announcements made at the company’s annual event, Workday Rising. Analysts led by Brent Bracelin said that they […]

items.title: Automaker giant Stellantis says customers’ personal data stolen during breach
items.description: One report says, citing the hackers who took credit for the breach, that 18 million customer records were stolen from Stellantis' customer database.

items.title: Vigience Announces SAP-integrated Vigience Field Service on Salesforce AppExchange
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, September 22, 2025--Vigience launches SAP-integrated Field Service app on Salesforce AppExchange, connecting SAP S/4HANA with Salesforce Field Service.

items.title: Dow up nearly 125 points on gains for shares of Apple, NVIDIA Corp.
items.description: Dow up nearly 125 points on gains for shares of Apple, NVIDIA Corp.

items.title: Social engineering campaigns highlight the ability to exploit human behavior
items.description: A report by S&P says organizations should consider changes to strengthen cyber governance, training and awareness.
